REGISTRATION.PENDING_MESSAGE: Our team will review your profile and confirm your access as soon as possible. You will receive a confirmation email with a link to the portal where you can sign in using your credentials.
REGISTRATION.REJECTED_MESSAGE: Our team has thoroughly reviewed your profile, but unfortunately, we are currently unable to grant you access to the Portal. Please note that access to the {{portalName}} is exclusive to {{dataspaceName}} members.
REGISTRATION.VERIFY_EMAIL_MESSAGE: You will need to verify your email to complete registration. An email has been sent to {{email}} with a verification link.
REGISTRATION.ONBOARD_SUCCESS_HEADING: Thank you for onboarding on the {{portalName}}!
REGISTRATION.ONBOARD_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Congratulations on successfully onboarding to our platform! We're thrilled to have you as part of our community. Explore our platform and discover services tailored just for you.

MULTI.AND_DESC: Conjunction of several expressions. Evaluates to true if and only if all child expressions are true
MULTI.OR_DESC: Disjunction of several expressions. Evaluates to true if and only if at least one child expression is true
MULTI.XONE_DESC: XONE operation. Evaluates to true if and only if exactly one child expression is true

ORGANIZATION.BILLING_SAME_AS_MAIN: Billing address is same as main address
ORGANIZATION.MAIN_CONTACT_TOOLTIP: Main Contact is needed for purposes such as use cases, events, membership etc.
ORGANIZATION.TECHNICAL_CONTACT_TOOLTIP: A technical contact will get notified in case of IT related topics
ORGANIZATION.MAIN_ADDRESS_PLACEHOLDER: Example Street 10b, 12345 Frankfurt am Main, Germany
ORGANIZATION.BILLING_ADDRESS_PLACEHOLDER: Example Street 10b, 12345 Frankfurt am Main, Germany

VALIDATION.INVALID_URL: {{field}} invalid, Please ensure it adheres to the following format: https://www.example.com
VALIDATION.INVALID_SUBDOMAIN: {{field}} needs to be a valid subdomain
VALIDATION.HAS_NUMBER: {{field}} should contain at least one number (0-9)
VALIDATION.HAS_UPPERCASE: {{field}} should contain at least one uppercase character (A-Z)
VALIDATION.HAS_LOWERCASE: {{field}} should contain at least one lowercase character (a-z)
VALIDATION.HAS_SPECIAL: {{field}} should contain at least one special character !"#$%&()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_{|}~

DELETE_CONNECTOR.TITLE: Delete Connector
DELETE_CONNECTOR.CAAS_INTRO: Deleting this connector will lead to
DELETE_CONNECTOR.CAAS_ITEM_DEPLOY: the connector being undeployed and deleted (all data is irreversibly lost)
DELETE_CONNECTOR.CAAS_ITEM_PORTAL: user access to the sovity customer portal being revoked if this is the only remaining CaaS connector
DELETE_CONNECTOR.CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this connector?

DELETE_USER.TITLE: Delete User
DELETE_USER.LAST_ADMIN_INTRO: You are trying to delete the last Participant Admin of
DELETE_USER.LAST_ADMIN_WARNING: This will result in irreversibly deleting the whole organization, including all of its users, connectors and central components.
DELETE_USER.LAST_ADMIN_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to proceed?
DELETE_USER.CREATOR_INTRO: You are trying to delete the creator of
DELETE_USER.SUCCESSOR_LINKED: Connectors and central components of {{userName}} will be linked to this successor
DELETE_USER.CONFIRM: Are you sure, you want to delete this user?
DELETE_USER.LINK_TO_CREATOR: All connectors, the user is associated with, will be linked to the creator of
